title: selaginella ketra-ayam
intro: Selaginella ketra-ayam is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella, a type of evergreen perennial plant that is commonly known as a "resurrection plant" due to its ability to revive itself after periods of drought and desiccation. The plant is used in traditional medicine in Indonesia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella ketra-ayam include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be taken as a treatment for various health conditions.
